description: ECB / Eurosystem Liquidity Detail Engine — granular ECB capital-injection data straight from the ECB Data Portal (excess liquidity, deposit-facility recourse, current accounts, net liquidity effect) plus the Eurosystem balance sheet and the three key rates. Produces an ECB liquidity regime, QT pace, rate corridor and a -2..+2 injection score. Output data/ecb-detail.json.

schedule.description: ECB Liquidity Detail Engine — daily 11:00 UTC
